author: samzhang02
description: Facilitate writing algorithm blocks in LaTeX.

manifest.author: SamZhang02
manifest.description: Plugin to facilitate writing algorithm blocks in LaTeX
manifest.name: LaTeX Algorithms

name: LaTeX Algorithms

releases.author: SamZhang02
releases.description:
First release!
### Fixed:
`\Return` now prints out `return` instead of `Return`, as per the standard Latex Algorithm blocks format.

### Added:
Proof keywords! You can now write proofs with this plugin too; Proof keywords are to be used outside of math blocks.
Check out `README.md` for all the proof keywords available. 

### Changed:
Fast-indentation can now be executed anywhere in the line and still only have the `\quad` inserted at the beginning of the line. 

### To come:
It seems like Shift + Tab might clash with some default key shortcuts. Any suggestions for an alternative key combination is highly appreciated!

releases.author: SamZhang02
releases.description:
Minor refactoring release:
- Added tables of all currently supported keywords in `README.md`
- Deleted redundant version import in `main.ts`

releases.author: SamZhang02
releases.description: The Obsidian Algorithm Plugin reads your previous inputs and automatically converts them into standard LaTeX algorithm format when detecting keywords like \If, \For, \State and more. With this plugin, you can easily take notes for your Algorithm classes in Obsidian, with functionalities such as fast indentation with Shift+Tab, conditionals, input/output, for/while loops, switch cases, and more.
